text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 59 

OTHC_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Other Part B Carrier Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments from Part B carrier and DME claims which appear in 
settings other than the 10 specific categories which are part of this file for a given year. Claims for other 
carrier/DME claim lines are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier and DME data files.
